source_title: International Visiting Student Program | Medical Student Research and International Studies (UPSOM/UPMC)
source_quote_under_280: This program is ONLY for international students who have completed their core clinical training and are in their final year of medical education. This program does not offer observerships/externships to medical graduates.
remaining_blocker: Page is system-level UPSOM/UPMC; no site-specific Western Psychiatric guarantee; psychiatric elective requires USMLE Step 2
notes: Conditionally promotable as SYSTEM_PAGE_NO_SITE_SPECIFIC_GUARANTEE. Domestic visiting program separately documented LCME/AOA-only. International program silent on Caribbean accreditation specifically; audience is enrolled-international-students-in-final-year only.
